title: Contact
subtitle: Let's connect!
description: Whether you have a project in mind, an opportunity to explore or just want to geek out about tech, my door is always open. Don't hesitate to reach out even if you're not sure what to say.
openTo: Particularly open to full-stack engineering challenges and remote roles.
preferredContact: For professional inquiries, email or LinkedIn work best. For a quicker exchange, WhatsApp is the way.
